title: koeleria cristata var. pubescens
intro: Koeleria cristata var. pubescens, also known as pubescent June grass, is a perennial grass species in the family Poaceae. It is a plant that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Koeleria cristata var. pubescens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as arthritis, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
